assumption_text: The episode is bounded to the theatre building and immediate grounds, excluding other strikes in the surrounding district.
rationale: This is the strongest spatially bounded direct-violence episode within the wider battle and best avoids contamination from citywide siege mortality.

assumption_text: Occupancy at the moment of strike is converted to exposure using a one-day person-month equivalent.
rationale: The event is effectively instantaneous for mortality accounting.

assumption_text: Fatalities are kept in the unknown-status core estimate rather than silently assigned to civilians, even though the site itself was overwhelmingly civilian.
rationale: This preserves strict status separation while still allowing a strong direct-death range.
